---
title: "About"
#image: blaubar.png
about:
  image-width: 10em
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/mastoffel
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=58uLFHoAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mastoffel/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:martin.adam.stoffel@gmail.com
---

Hi, I'm Martin. At heart, I'm curious about nature and technology and everything in between. Until recently, I was a researcher at the University of Edinburgh working on evolutionary genetics and biostatistics, and also a [PIBBSS](https://www.pibbss.ai/) fellow exploring risks from future AI systems. Now, I'm a Research Data Scientist in the [Research Engineering Group](https://www.turing.ac.uk/research-engineering) at the [Alan Turing Institute](https://www.turing.ac.uk/), combining my passion for building things and tackling new challenges across disciplines. 

Outside of work, I like kettlebells, remote islands, wingspan, 5s football, open water swimming, conversations without time-pressure, pull-ups, Rumo, forests, the Economist, cold showers, time-restricted eating and northern elephant seals.

Always happy to chat, so feel free to get in touch.
